evidence_quotes.quote: video game companies being forced to make an end of life plan for video games

paragraphs.text: Hello and thank you for granting me, an average EU citizen, the opportunity to comment and grant feedback on this important piece of legislation. I believe this Act is going into the right direction to protect consumers from the malicious practices of various companies for example, gambling on their platforms. Though, adding a section about video game companies being forced to make an end of life plan for video games to ensure and protect the consumer. I write this out of fear that my favorite game, Assassin's Creed: Black Flag(multiplayer to be precise) is shut down and never more will I able to experience all the fun I had with it, which I bought expecting to have it untill I grew bored of it. I hope you take this into consideration as support for such action has already been proven through the Stop Destroying Video Games initiative reaching over a million signatures. Thank you for reading and the consideration! Warm greetings.
